title: THE Explosives Pack
description: Over 600 Explosive Items To Help You Destroy Not Just Your World, But Possibly Your PC! 😂
body:
# 🗒️ Description!
THE Explosive Pack consists of around 8 TNT mods, containing around 600+ Explosive items. Meaning, you'll be up for a good time. The mods vary in extremeness of course. Some might have better and more "explosive" TNTs as others... But regardless, they all have some uniqueness to them... Just know that some can cause more problems than others, so watch out for y'all PCs 😅...

## 👥 Credits/Mods! [Give em a follow if you dont mind ♥️]
[Lucky TNT Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/lucky-tnt-mod),
[Unlucky TNT](https://modrinth.com/mod/unlucky-tnt),
[TNT Plus Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/tnt-plus-mod),
[Insane TNT](https://modrinth.com/mod/insane-tnt),
[Silly TNT Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/sillytnt),
[Boooom!](https://modrinth.com/mod/boooom!),
[Simple TNT Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/simple-tnt-mod),
[More Fun TNTs](https://modrinth.com/mod/more-fun-tnts),
[JEI](https://modrinth.com/mod/jei/version/15.20.0.106),
[Geckolib](https://modrinth.com/mod/geckolib),
[Pehkui](https://modrinth.com/mod/pehkui)

### Enjoy!! ⭐
